## 2. Type of Change
- [ ] New Document / Chapter draft
- [ ] Revision / Fix to existing document
- [ ] QA / Review Log addition
- [ ] Repository infrastructure update (scripts, configs)

## 3. Quality Verification Checklist
*Please verify compliance with the Quality Plan criteria before submitting:*
- [ ] **Completeness:** All standard chapters, files, and templates details are complete.
- [ ] **Consistency:** Glossary terms, database fields, and API endpoints match across documents.
- [ ] **Traceability:** Requirements (FR) are traced to Design (SDD) and Testing (TC) targets.
- [ ] **Formatting:** Markdown syntax (headers hierarchy, lists, tables, Mermaid code blocks) renders properly.
- [ ] **Grammar:** Spelling, syntax, and technical English vocabulary verified.
